---
title: "Research Themes"
---

This page is set up to organize publications by research theme. Add papers under the themes below as you refine the public version of the site.

## Surgical AI and Prediction Models

- Selected publications and projects on foundation models, surgical risk prediction, discharge prediction, computer vision, and digital biomarkers.

## Perioperative Outcomes and Recovery

- Selected publications and projects on postoperative deterioration, recovery, failure to rescue, perioperative systems, and collaborative surgical audit.

## Gastrointestinal Physiology and Motility

- Selected publications and projects on Gastric Alimetry, body surface gastric mapping, gastroduodenal disorders, and pelvic floor physiology.

## Pancreas, Colorectal, and HPB Surgery

- Selected publications and projects on pancreas cancer, pancreatic surgery, colorectal outcomes, acute pancreatitis, and HPB research.

## Collaborative Research

- Selected publications and projects from STRATA, TASMAN, EuroSurg, COVIDSurg/GlobalSurg, and other collaborative research networks.
